'''ratate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otoacoustically|otoacoustically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otoacoustically|otoacoustically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ratate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ratate|ratate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ratatesher|ratatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratatesherĂ«m|ratatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ratatero|ratatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ratateshĂ«|ratateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratateshĂ«m|ratateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiratatero|gokiratatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiratateshĂ«|gokiratateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratateshĂ«m|gokiratateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goratankerom|goratankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goratankeshĂ«|goratankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goratankeshĂ«m|goratankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goratankeya|goratankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rataterom|rataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratatemu|ratatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ratateya|ratateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirataterom|gokirataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratatemu|gokiratatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiratateya|gokiratateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ratatate|ratatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ratatatesher|ratatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratatatesherĂ«m|ratatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ratatatero|ratatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ratatateshĂ«|ratatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratatateshĂ«m|ratatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiratatatero|gokiratatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiratatateshĂ«|gokiratatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratatateshĂ«m|gokiratatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goratatankerom|goratatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goratatankeshĂ«|goratatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goratatankeshĂ«m|goratatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goratatankeya|goratatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ratataterom|ratataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ratatatemu|ratatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ratatateya|ratatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiratataterom|gokiratataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiratatatemu|gokiratatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiratatateya|gokiratatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠte|rĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠtesher|rĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠtero|rĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠtero|gokirĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠterom|rĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠtemu|rĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠtĂŠteya|rĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠterom|gokirĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠtĂŠteya|gokirĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:raftafte|raftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:raftaftesher|raftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raftaftesherĂ«m|raftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raftaftero|raftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:raftafteshĂ«|raftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raftafteshĂ«m|raftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraftaftero|gokiraftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiraftafteshĂ«|gokiraftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiraftafteshĂ«m|gokiraftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goraftafnkerom|goraftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goraftafnkeshĂ«|goraftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goraftafnkeshĂ«m|goraftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goraftafnkeya|goraftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raftafterom|raftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raftaftemu|raftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:raftafteya|raftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraftafterom|gokiraftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiraftaftemu|gokiraftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiraftafteya|gokiraftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
